title: alyssum montanum subsp. pedemontanum
intro: Alyssum montanum subsp. pedemontanum, also known as Mountain Sweet Alyssum, is a sub-species of the Alyssum montanum plant, a perennial herb belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Mountain Sweet Alyssum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies.
